title: Email fix — portrait messages scroll to the bottom
description:
Fixed a bug where tall portrait emails (e.g. Disney+ payment notices) were cut off with no way to scroll. The reading pane viewport was using flex layout in portrait mode, which made it grow past the panel and get clipped by overflow:hidden.

The body viewport now stays height-bounded and scrolls vertically. Portrait emails stay centered with margin auto. Scrollbars are slightly more visible on the reading pane.

Who is affected: PipeSync users reading long HTML emails on pipeshare.live. Cache bust hl58.
changeLog: Fix: portrait emails no longer clipped — body viewport scrolls vertically.
Fix: removed flex layout on scroll container that blocked overflow.
Email grid height chain corrected (min-height: 0 through flex parents).
Slightly more visible scrollbars on email reading pane.
